# Rerun 0.33.0 ŌĆö API cheat-sheet (introspected from the installed package)

Generated by introspecting `rerun-sdk==0.33.0` in the pixi `ros` env (Python 3.12) ŌĆö
**ground truth**, not docs. Regenerate with the snippet in this folder's `README.md`.

## Logging / sink API (record side ŌĆö `record_rrd.py`)
```
rr.init(application_id, *, recording_id=None, spawn=False, init_logging=True, ...)
rr.save(path, default_blueprint=None, recording=None, *, write_footer=True)   # .rrd file sink
rr.set_time(timeline, *, sequence=None, duration=None, timestamp=None)        # set ONE of the three
rr.log(entity_path, entity, *extra, static=False, recording=None)
rr.spawn(*, port=9876, connect=True, memory_limit='75%', ...)                 # spawn a live Viewer
rr.connect_grpc(url=None, ...)                                                # connect to a running Viewer
rr.serve_grpc(*, grpc_port=None, ...) -> str                                  # serve the recording over gRPC
```

### Gotchas vs older Rerun (these WILL bite if you guess from memory)
- **Time:** `set_time_seconds` / `set_time_sequence` are **REMOVED**. Use the unified
  `rr.set_time("sim_time", duration=<float seconds>)` (a float ŌåÆ seconds) or `sequence=<int>` /
  `timestamp=<datetime>`. Set exactly ONE. No monotonicity requirement.
- **Sinks:** `rr.connect` and `rr.serve` are **gone** ŌåÆ `rr.connect_grpc` / `rr.serve_grpc`.
  `rr.spawn()` launches a Viewer and connects to it.
- **`rr.Scalar` does NOT exist ŌåÆ use `rr.Scalars`** (plural) for scalar time series.

## Archetypes we log
```
rr.EncodedImage(*, contents=<jpeg bytes>, media_type="image/jpeg", ...)   # camera frames (JPEG, per #1)
rr.Image(...)            # raw image (avoid ŌĆö large; use EncodedImage)
rr.Transform3D(...)      # EE pose / target_frame
rr.Scalars(values)       # joint positions/gripper as scalar series
rr.TextLog(...)          # episode markers / task string
```
Confirmed present: `Image, EncodedImage, Transform3D, Scalars, TextLog`. Absent: `Scalar`.

## Live-view + file at once (decision #2) ŌĆö TO CONFIRM in step 3
Need both an `.rrd` file (`rr.save`) AND a live Viewer (`rr.spawn`/`connect_grpc`) for operator
framing. 0.33 has one active sink per call; resolve the multi-sink/tee pattern when writing
`record_rrd.py` (candidates: a second `RecordingStream`, or `serve_grpc` + a connected viewer +
periodic `save`). Verify by introspection/test, don't assume.

## Read API (`rrd_dataset.py`) ŌĆö `rerun-sdk[catalog]`, now in the `ros` env
**VERIFIED (step 4):** local read = the **chunk API**, NOT a dataframe ŌĆö `rerun.dataframe` does not
exist in 0.33, and the catalog `reader(using_index_values=, fill_latest_at=, window=)` is a
server/catalog surface, not local. Working pattern (see `teleop_arkit/rrd_dataset.py`):
`RrdReader(path).store().stream().to_chunks()` ŌåÆ per `Chunk`: `.entity_path`, `.to_record_batch()`
(Arrow: `log_time`/`sim_time` ns + `Scalars:scalars` list<double> | `EncodedImage:blob` JPEG bytes).
There is **no high-level local `fill_latest_at`** ŌĆö we do latest-at alignment on **`log_time`** ourselves.
